zh.label: 最新版本
zh.title: 滚动截图选区与拼接修复
changes: 滚动截图期间保留选中区域描边，滚动时仍能看清捕获范围
优化滚动拼接匹配，避免极小位移或误匹配导致长图中间出现重叠内容
应用、Sparkle 更新 ZIP 和手动安装 DMG 均已签名并通过 Apple 公证

en.label: Latest
en.title: Scrolling capture selection and stitching fixes
changes: The selected region outline now stays visible during scrolling capture so the capture bounds remain clear.
Scrolling stitch matching now avoids appending tiny movements or false matches that could create overlapped content in long screenshots.
The app, Sparkle update ZIP, and manual-install DMG are signed and notarized by Apple.
